system_rules: GREEN/YELLOW alerts automatically trigger Execution Agent logic. Re-analysis required on major event detection.

rules.kill_switch: Google TPU partnership shift or >15% reduction in TPU CAPEX

CEO revision of AI run-rate or Yield > 5.2%
2026 Q1 profit growth < 10% or Major audit
